text: I feel uncertain and somewhat disoriented, both physically—surrounded by glass, industrial lights, and modern displays—and mentally, with my thoughts repeating. The environment seems designed for analysis and experimentation, yet my own mind is looping in indecision. It’s as if I’m caught between curiosity about this place and doubt about my own actions. The juxtaposition leaves me questioning my purpose here, yet strangely fascinated by that very uncertainty.
